title: Test Runner Evidence
description: AUDIT-04 test runner evidence record. Parsed from real `node --test --test-reporter=tap` stdout; model narration is rejected (D-03) and malformed output hard-fails (D-04). x-binding: binding — parsed state blocks ship via the audit fold (the v2 audit embeds this record as tests_executed).

phase.description: Two-digit phase number (matches PHASE_NUMBER_RE from paths.ts).

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 strict timestamp (TD-01 shape). When the runner output was captured.

runner.description: The AUDIT-04 trust boundary — the runner const. Any other source fails closed (D-04).
